name: Stuffed Peppers-- Thai Style
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tablespoon Cornstarch dissolved in 1 tablespoon Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off the peppers and seed them; set aside.
2. Mix together the filling ingredients thoroughly.
3. Stuff the peppers with the mixture.
4. Place the stuffed peppers in a shallow baking dish.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes, or steam over high heat for 30 minutes.
6. Before serving, brush the peppers with oil to make them shine and sprinkle with the chili peppers.
7. Serve hot or at room temperature.
